systems.system_notes: Mobile-bearing unicompartmental knee platform anchored to the official Zimmer Biomet Oxford Partial Knee product page and cementless brochure.

trays.tray_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet Oxford materials support dedicated instrumentation for unicompartmental knee preparation and implantation.

components.component_notes: Official Oxford materials describe the unicompartmental femoral component family.
Official Oxford materials describe tibial tray/baseplate options within the partial knee construct.
Official Oxford materials describe the mobile meniscal bearing used in the unicompartmental construct.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The current Oxford public source set confirms the construct and implant families but this pass does not include the full partial-knee product-code matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper catalogue or technique appendix pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
